summary: Lane RL-005: Plugin Security Manifest + Trust Model completed. Produced comprehensive audit artifact at docs/json/opencode/audits/plugin-security-manifest-audit.v1.json covering: full plugin architecture map (SDK types, loading pipeline, hook interface, desktop plugin layer, tool registry integration), security gap audit answering 11 adversarial questions (5 critical, 4 high, 1 moderate, 1 low), proposed capability manifest schema with 14 capability definitions and runtime enforcement design, and UI display recommendations for plugin cards, capability badges, and install-time permission flows. Two out-of-scope findings recorded (missing security tests, broken PluginTransport export).
